channel.title: WordPress Hooks
channel.description: Is it possible to use WordPress Hooks in frontend using Frontity? If not then how we will be able to use the WordPress other plugins like WooCommerce?

item.title: WordPress Hooks
item.dc:creator: help.highaddons
item.description:
Is it possible to use WordPress Hooks in frontend using Frontity?
If not then how we will be able to use the WordPress other plugins like WooCommerce?

Read full topic
